Change has been successfully cherry-picked as 915135c37cbfa6851a5ec732afd20955eb020566 by Oleg Drokin

Patch Set 3:

I'm sorry that I have some questions about this patch. The code check the value of mbo_eadatasize, but in function req_capsule_set_size, I think we could trigger LBUG() through the condition which is 'size % rmf_size != 0'.

Patch Set 3:

Yunye Ry, when we set "RMF_F_STRUCT_ARRAY", we do need the field's buffer size must be a whole multiple of the declared rmf_size, so we do this check in function req_capsule_set_size() and trigger LBUG about this. I think we don't need to pre-check this outside of the function.

Patch Set 3:

> Yunye Ry, when we set "RMF_F_STRUCT_ARRAY", we do need the field's
 > buffer size must be a whole multiple of the declared rmf_size, so
 > we do this check in function req_capsule_set_size() and trigger
 > LBUG about this. I think we don't need to pre-check this outside of
 > the function.

But in my opinion, LBUG will cause kernel panic, we can trigger the LBUG condition by sending corrupted packets, resulting in kernel panic. I don't think we should cause kernel panic in this case, can we cut the connection or other solutions to fix this situation?

Patch Set 3:

(2 comments)

Yunye Ry, it does appear that there is still a possible bug in the code.  Since this patch has already landed, there should be a separate patch (also under lU-12602) to fix this problem.

parents.subject: LU-12605 tgt: check client data size in target_handle_connect()

commit.subject: LU-12602 mdt: check EA size in mdt_getxattr_pack_reply()
commit.message:
LU-12602 mdt: check EA size in mdt_getxattr_pack_reply()

Check EA data size(non-positive or excessively large) in case of
any corruption.

Change-Id: I8ccea214f8d7c0403a9df180acf487ee381b8d77
Reported-by: Alibaba Cloud <yunye.ry@alibaba-inc.com>
Signed-off-by: Emoly Liu <emoly@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/35768
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
